title: trisetaria spicata subsp. pilosiglumis
intro: Trisetaria spicata subsp. pilosiglumis, also known as the False Oat Grass, is a subspecies of the Trisetaria spicata plant. It is a perennial grass native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trisetaria spicata subsp. pilosiglumis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in herbal remedies in the form of tinctures, capsules, or infusions.
